# ErgoRemote

ErgoRemote is an ergonomic home office review site written by Alex Sabr.
The site focuses on practical buying guides for remote workers, especially chairs, desks, monitors, laptop stands, and related setup gear.

## Author

- Alex Sabr
- Remote work ergonomics reviewer
- Focus: ergonomic home office setups for work-from-home professionals

- /about/
- /best-picks/best-ergonomic-chair-for-back-pain/

- /best-picks/best-home-office-desk-essentials-first-remote-job/
- /comparisons/flexispot-e7-vs-uplift-v2/
- /comparisons/herman-miller-aeron-vs-steelcase-leap/
